news.headline: Legislator in West Virginia proposes digital asset reserve bill; pending state laws may create $23 billion Bitcoin demand.
news.summary: An examination conducted by VanEck revealed that pending strategic reserve legislation in several US states could potentially generate a demand of $23 billion for Bitcoin.

However, there is a drawback associated with this approach, as highlighted in a recent Investor's Business Daily article.

Bitcoin, Ethereum, XRP, Dogecoin, and other cryptos rally, with XRP surging by 13.5%. Bitcoin at $98,205.44, Ethereum at $2,744.60, Solana at $202.28, Dogecoin at $0.2775. Important stats include 86,832 traders liquidated in 24hrs for $184.85 million. Robinhood and Coinbase developments noted.
news.summary: The crypto markets are showing strong momentum on Friday, as key assets are marking gains. The current prices are as follows: Bitcoin stands at $98,205.44 with a 2.7% increase, Ethereum at $2,744.60 with a 3.9% increase, Solana at $202.28 with a 5.2% increase, XRP at $2.79 reflecting a 13.5% increase, Dogecoin at $0.2775 with an 8% increase, and Shiba Inu at $0.00001688 showing a 4.4% increase.Notable statistics indicate that large transaction volume has surged by 5.8%, while daily active addresses have grown by 5.3%. Transactions exceeding $100,000 have decreased from 9,846 to 9,450 within one day, and exchanges netflows are down by 347%. Coinglass data reveals that 86,832 traders were liquidated in the past 24 hours, resulting in losses of $184.85 million.In notable developments, Robinhood’s January metrics indicate progress, however, crypto notional trading volume faced obstacles sequentially. Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong seeks clarity from Congress on whether tokens should be classified as securities or commodities. For the full story, readers can refer to Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Liberty All-Star Growth Fund, Inc. provided its January 2025 monthly update, highlighting its All-Cap Growth Fund strategy.
news.summary: In Boston, as of February 14, 2025, the Liberty All-Star Growth Fund, Inc. (NYSE: ASG) released its monthly update for January 2025. ASG operates as an All-Cap Growth Fund, employing a strategy that involves a blend of three key approaches to investment. This update marks the fund's performance and highlights its investment approach for the month. Investors can follow the ASG ticker symbol for more information on the fund's activities.

The correct number of units issued is 6,815,370 at a price of $0.30 per unit, resulting in gross proceeds of $2,044,611. Inaccurate figures for the units issued, gross proceeds, and cash remuneration to finders were initially provided.

news.headline: Abu Dhabi's sovereign fund acquires $436M in Bitcoin ETF shares through Mubadala Investment Company.
news.summary: The sovereign wealth fund of Abu Dhabi's government, known as Mubadala Investment Company, recently made a significant investment in Bitcoin ETF shares, totaling $436 million.

news.headline: 2025 Chicago Auto Show in final weekend, running Feb 8-17 at McCormick Place. 117th edition attracts thousands.
news.summary: The 2025 Chicago Auto Show, now in its 117th edition, is concluding its 10-day run at McCormick Place on Feb. 17 after attracting thousands of attendees. Featuring a diverse range of family-friendly activities, this year's show has been well-received by the public. Held from Feb. 8-17, the event has provided a platform for automotive enthusiasts to explore the latest offerings from various manufacturers.

news.headline: Coinbase Q4 revenues exceed expectations, total revenue hits $2.272 billion, Transaction revenues beat by 33%. Goldman Sachs raises target to $350, while Canaccord Genuity raises to $400. EBITDA margins approach 57%.
news.summary: Shares of Coinbase Global Inc (NASDAQ:COIN) fell despite positive fourth-quarter results. Goldman Sachs analyst reiterated a Neutral rating with a new price target of $350. The company's Q4 revenue was $2.272 billion, beating estimates by 22%. Transaction revenues exceeded estimates by 33%, while subscription and services revenue surpassed estimates by 6%. Canaccord Genuity analyst maintained a Buy rating, with a price target increase from $280 to $400. Revenue for the quarter grew by 88% to $2.3 billion, and adjusted EBITDA was $1.3 billion. The company showed strong growth driven by volume and maintained tight operating expense control with EBITDA margins close to 57%.

news.headline: Record-high egg prices drove January inflation higher, with a dozen eggs costing $4.95, up by 15.2%, contributing to a 0.5% increase in food costs at home. The 4-year increase in egg prices is the largest ever at 238%.
news.summary: In January, inflation data showed a higher-than-anticipated increase, particularly in grocery prices, driven by a significant surge in egg prices. The average cost of a dozen eggs hit an all-time high of $4.95 last month, marking a 15.2% rise and contributing to a 0.5% overall increase in at-home food costs. Charlie Billelo, from Creative Planning, pointed out that this 238% spike in egg prices over the past four years is the largest such increase ever recorded. The US is facing record-high egg prices, reflecting a 238% surge over the last four years.

news.headline: CEO Tom Hogan steps down at Perficient, board appoints Xiao Guo as interim CEO.
news.summary: In St. Louis, Tom Hogan is stepping down as Chief Executive Officer of Perficient. The Perficient Board of Directors has named Xiao Guo as the Interim CEO in his place.

news.headline: Job cuts at Energy Department signal start of Trump's reform, part of broader downsizing affecting multiple agencies.
news.summary: Numerous agencies have been hit with widespread layoffs as President Trump and Elon Musk push forward with their plans to significantly reduce and restructure the federal government's staff.

news.headline: S&P 500 nears all-time high, up 1.5% on the week, driven by strong earnings growth, with 146 companies mentioning tariffs.
news.summary: As we approach midday on Friday, stock market figures are showing a mixed trend, with major indices remaining close to the flatline. Traders are grappling with multiple factors such as disappointing retail sales figures, potential tariffs, and ongoing geopolitical events. The S&P 500 has witnessed a 1.5% increase throughout the week and is on the brink of reaching a new record high. Corporate earnings have been a significant driver for the market, recording a robust performance not seen since 2021. In the fourth quarter, S&P 500 companies reported a substantial 16.4% year-over-year growth in earnings, according to data from FactSet. A noteworthy observation from FactSet is that during earnings calls, 146 companies in the S&P 500 expressed concerns regarding tariffs, marking the highest number since mid-2019. This data on tariffs has triggered some apprehension among investors. For a detailed report, access the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: DexCom's Q4 revenue grew to $1.114 billion, beating estimates. FY25 guidance includes revenue of $4.60 billion and more. No financial payments in Abbott settlement.
news.summary: Dexcom, Inc. reported a strong performance for the fourth quarter with a revenue increase of 8% year-over-year, reaching $1.114 billion, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.104 billion. Domestic revenue grew by 4%, while international revenue saw significant growth, up 17% reported and 19% organically. The company reaffirmed its full-year 2025 guidance, expecting revenue of $4.60 billion (slightly below the consensus of $4.61 billion), with an adjusted gross profit margin of approximately 64%-65% and an adjusted operating margin of 21%.Additionally, in December, Abbott Inc. (NYSE:ABT) and DexCom settled all ongoing patent disputes concerning continuous glucose monitoring products. This agreement resolves all current cases globally and includes a provision preventing patent, trade dress, and design rights litigations between the two companies for the next decade. No financial terms were disclosed as part of the settlement.

news.headline: Rudy Giuliani joins Frankspeech Network, Inc. board of directors (OTC Pink "FSBN") as America's Mayor.
news.summary: Former Mayor Rudy Giuliani has agreed to serve as a Director at FrankSpeech Network, Inc., also known as Mike Lindell Media Corp. The company is listed as (OTC: PINK FSBN). Giuliani's appointment adds to the board's composition and highlights his involvement in the media sector.

FDA approves Merilog (insulin-aspart-szjj) as biosimilar to Novolog for diabetes treatment, improving access to options.
news.summary: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration, based in Silver Spring, Maryland, has taken steps towards enhancing access to insulin treatment options. On February 14, 2025, they authorized the use of Merilog (insulin-aspart-szjj) as a biosimilar to Novolog (insulin aspart). This approval aims to aid in enhancing glycemic control for individuals.

news.headline: Bradford Health Services opposes new VA-focused healthcare center in Alabama backed by Coast to Coast Charitable Corporation.
news.summary: In Valley, Alabama, a mental health and substance abuse treatment center is encountering resistance from Bradford Behavioral Health, a prominent SUD treatment provider based in Birmingham. The facility, located in Chambers County, is set to provide crucial services to individuals in need. The opposition from Bradford Behavioral Health highlights the competitive landscape in the industry. The new treatment center is aiming to address the rising demand for mental health and substance abuse services in the area. This development underscores the importance of access to quality care, especially with statistics showing a significant increase in individuals seeking help for such issues in recent years.

news.headline: Avelo Airlines celebrates Valentine's Day by surprising 30 loyal customers with free flights and offering a 40% discount to all travelers, surpassing 3 million customers in New Haven, CT.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Avelo pleasantly surprised 30 of its loyal customers by gifting them free flights. In the spirit of Valentine's Day, Avelo expressed appreciation for all travelers by offering a 40% discount. This act of generosity comes as Avelo celebrates surpassing the milestone of flying 3 million customers in New Haven, CT. The company's commitment to customer satisfaction and gratitude was evident in their unexpected gestures of kindness.

Info-Tech Research Group's 2025 Data Quadrant Report names top BI solutions for data-driven decisions. User feedback drive insights.

The report, derived from user evaluations on the SoftwareReviews platform, offers valuable insights. Originating from TORONTO, the report was published on February 14.

news.headline: XRP surged 12% in 7 days, while Bitcoin struggles sideways due to macro uncertainty. XRP hits resistance levels earlier than expected. Trader wonders if it's XRP's strength or Bitcoin's weakness. BTC bids at $94,100 removed.
news.summary: XRP (CRYPTO: XRP) has seen a significant increase of 12% in the past week, while Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) has faced challenges with stagnant movement due to uncertain macro conditions. A well-known trader, CrediBULL Crypto, pointed out that XRP has encountered crucial resistance levels earlier than anticipated, contrasting Bitcoin's struggle to surpass the $100,000 mark. Initially, there were expectations for XRP's performance to align with Bitcoin's breakthrough; however, there is now indecision regarding whether this indicates XRP's strength or Bitcoin's weaknesses. Consequently, CrediBULL decided to eliminate BTC bids at $94,100 and instead keep a close eye on XRP's movements.

PetVivo Holdings, Inc. announced fiscal Q3 2025 results, ending December 31, 2024, as a biomedical company for animals.
news.summary: PetVivo Holdings, Inc., a prominent biomedical company providing revolutionary therapeutics and medical devices for equines and companion animals, has disclosed its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter that concluded on December 31, 2024. PetVivo Holdings, Inc. is listed under OTCQB as PETV and OTCPINK as PETVW.

news.summary: In the latest updates, it has been reported that the local government has approved a budget of $5 million for the construction of a new hospital in the city. The hospital is expected to have 100 hospital beds and will provide healthcare services to around 50,000 residents in the area. The construction work is set to begin next month and is estimated to be completed within two years. This initiative is aimed at improving healthcare facilities and accessibility for the growing population in the city.

news.headline: $651M spot BTC ETF outflows spark fear among traders as Bitcoin price nears $95,000 support, raising concerns of a crash.
news.summary: The Bitcoin price is under stress due to significant outflows of $651 million in spot BTC ETF. Traders are closely monitoring the $95,000 level as a crucial support point amidst this pressure.

news.headline: CMS Energy declares dividend on 4.200% Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series C, payable on April 15, 2025.
news.summary: In Jackson, Michigan, on February 14, 2025, the Board of Directors of CMS Energy announced a dividend for the 4.200% Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Stock, Series C. Shareholders of record at the close of business will receive the dividend on April 15, 2025.

news.headline: AANP supports ICAN Act to remove nurse practitioners' practice barriers, enhancing patient access to healthcare.
news.summary: The ICAN Act is aimed at eliminating obstacles for nurse practitioners. The American Association of Nurse Practitioners (AANP) openly backs this initiative, with gratitude to Senators Merkley (D-OR) and others. The proposed legislation seeks to improve care delivery and increase nurses' accessibility. This is anticipated to have a significant impact on the healthcare sector by enhancing efficiency and expanding patient access to essential services.

news.headline: Matthews International to strengthen governance with new Board Chair, Independent Director with EV experience. New appointment soon.
news.summary: The organization has declared a change in the leadership of the Board Chair and intends to appoint an Independent Director with extensive expertise in battery and electric vehicle (EV) technology. The appointment of the new director, who will bring valuable insight to the company, is expected to occur shortly.

news.headline: AGC of California announced Constructor Award winners at 2025 Installation & Awards Gala. Event held at Fairmont Hotel on Feb. 7.
news.summary: On Feb. 7, 2025, The Associated General Contractors of California (AGC of California) hosted the fully booked 2025 Installation & Awards Gala at the iconic Fairmont Hotel in San Francisco. The event was attended by a large number of guests.
